ogTitle: Paradise Beach vs Paraparap: Climate Safety

heading: Paradise Beach vs Paraparap — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paradise Beach, Victoria and Paraparap, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paraparap has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Paradise Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paradise Beach or Paraparap safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paradise Beach has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Paraparap scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paradise Beach scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Paraparap scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paradise Beach or Paraparap?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paraparap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
